titleStmt.title: SII 24.228: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 228. (A.R. No. 21 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers another gift of 34(1/2) (vēli ?) of land by the king in Tuṟaiyūr in Maḻa-nāḍu alias Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to the bhaṭṭas and the god of the same agaram. Engraved in continuation of No. 227. This is also dated in the 12th year and 102nd day of the king (vide. No. 227).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷa nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nām nam perāl vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāma ccaturvedimaṅkalattil bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum Ivvakarattu nāyiṉār kotaṇṭarāmap perumāḷukkum maḻa nāṭāṉa Irācairāca vaḷanāṭṭu melai muṟiyil tuṟaiyūril taṅkaḷukku tanta nilam muppattu nālaraiyum Inṉilattāl varum nattamaṉai kaḷum nir nilaikaḷum tiṭarum kulaiyum varampum Āṭṭaippāḻum Uṭ(p)paṭa pati ṉoṉṟā
vatu pacāṉa mutalāka taṅkaḷukku bhudānamāka tantom Iṉṉilam muppattu nālarai yum Iṉṉāḷ mutal kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvum kaṭaippūvum vampum koḻuntum mañcaḷ Iñci vāḻai kamuku Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayirum karumpum ceṅkaḻunirum Uḷ ḷiṭṭu maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa payirkaḷum ceytu koṇṭu Anubhavittup potavum Iṉṉilattāl varum kaṭamai Antarāyam kāriya Ārāṭci nelvari kācu kaṭamai māvaṭai maravaṭai puṉpayir taṟi Iṟai cekku Iṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārap pāṭṭam mauṉam pāṭṭam pāci pāṭṭam Oḻukku nir pāṭṭam Iṭaivari Iṉavari Erivari kāṇikkai kāttikai paccai pañ
cupili Olai Eḻuttu viṉiyokam vācalppeṟu lāñcaṉaip peṟu Āḷ tāḻvu taccut tāḻvu peṭṭi nirāṇi kāverik karai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti toṭṭap puṟavāyam maṟṟu Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻittu muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum mutalaṟat tavirttu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrādityavaṟ cel(la) vatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉubhavittup potuka § Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu 10 2 2 nāḷ 100 2 2 nilam muppat
tu nālaraikkum Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
